title: Lunara Review — Homepage Placement

fields.label: Top Homepage Showcase
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_home_hero_featured
fields.instructions: Makes this review eligible for the top homepage hero lane. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_home_hero_featured.

fields.label: Top Showcase Priority
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_home_hero_priority
fields.instructions: Lower numbers appear first. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_home_hero_priority.

fields.label: Featured Criticism Shelf
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_home_featured_shelf
fields.instructions: Makes this review eligible for the lower featured criticism shelf. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_home_featured_shelf.

fields.label: Featured Shelf Priority
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_home_featured_priority
fields.instructions: Lower numbers appear first. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_home_featured_priority.

description: ACF Pro homepage placement controls for Review posts.
